chief_complaint: 7-year-old girl presents with Epstein-Barr Virus-Positive Diffuse Large B-Cell Lymphoma after kidney transplantation.
history: Patient has Schimke Immuno-Osseous Dysplasia, a rare autosomal recessive multisystem disorder. She underwent kidney transplantation at 7 years old and developed post-transplant lymphoproliferative disorder. She received rituximab therapy and reduced-intensity immunosuppression.
exam: Vital signs: not provided. Physical examination findings: not provided.
labs: ECG: not provided. Bloods: not provided. Imaging: not provided. Epstein-Barr virus-positive diffuse large B-cell lymphoma confirmed.
correct_diagnosis: Epstein-Barr Virus-Positive Diffuse Large B-Cell Lymphoma
differentials: Epstein-Barr Virus-Positive Diffuse Large B-Cell Lymphoma
correct_ranking: Epstein-Barr Virus-Positive Diffuse Large B-Cell Lymphoma
